ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Soft delete timestamp to handle account deactivation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the bookmark */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmarked webpage */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bookmarked webpage */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has visited the bookmarked webpage */,
  "typed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has typed the URL of the bookmarked webpage */,
  "last_visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the user visited the bookmarked webpage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bookmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bookmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the bookmark */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the bookmarked page */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is a favorite */,
  "last_visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last visit to the bookmarked page */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the bookmark is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is a default category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_categories" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tag */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tag is a default tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_tags" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the note is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the search query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search query was entered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search query was created */,
  "is_saved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the search query is saved for later use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search query the result is associated with */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark the result is associated with */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the result (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search result was generated */,
  "is_clicked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the search result was clicked */,
  "click_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the search result was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES search_queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., bookmark creation, search query) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics event was recorded */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional data related to the event (e.g., session ID, device info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the integration */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party service */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's account on the third-party service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was set up */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the integration is active */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Token used for authentication with the third-party service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who requested the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key itself */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the API key */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API key expires */,
  "is_revoked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the API key is revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
